workflow_runs.name: CI
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: update Tauri configuration for macOS packaging

head_commit.message:
fix: update Tauri configuration for macOS packaging

- Change productName from 'mac' to 'PET Pal'
- Update bundle identifier from 'com.tauri.dev' to 'com.petpal.app'
- Correct devUrl from 'localhost:3000' to 'localhost:5173'
- Add Tauri build scripts to package.json
- Add bundle metadata (category, copyright, description)

repository.name: pet-pal
repository.description: PET Pal - macOS PET Learning App with Melody theme, sentence learning, and exam simulator

workflow_runs.name: Build macOS Application
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: remove Tauri private key requirement for CI build

head_commit.message:
fix: remove Tauri private key requirement for CI build

- Remove TAURI_PRIVATE_KEY and TAURI_KEY_PASSWORD environment variables
- Add --verbose flag to Tauri build for debugging
- Allow unsigned builds in CI environment

workflow_runs.name: Build macOS Application
workflow_runs.display_title: ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for macOS Tauri build

head_commit.message:
ci: add GitHub Actions workflow for macOS Tauri build

- Add build-macos.yml workflow for automated macOS app packaging
- Setup Rust, Node.js, and caching for efficient builds
- Upload artifacts and create releases on version tags
- Support both development and production builds
